title: arabis umbrosa var. glabra
intro: Arabis umbrosa var. glabra, also known as smooth rockcress, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arabis umbrosa var. glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies and supplements.
